revision.comment: Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/Kanonbd24|Kanonbd24]] ([[User talk:Kanonbd24|talk]]) to last revision by PrimeHunter
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki oldid|Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[:en:List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki oldid|Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[:en:MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[:en:List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki oldid|Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[:en:Permalink|Permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[:en:MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[:en:List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki oldid|Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{pp-semi-indef|small=yes}}{{pp-move-indef|small=yes}} {{information page|H:PERL|H:PLINK|WP:PERMLINK}} A '''permanent link''' (or '''[[:en:Permalink|Permalink]]''') is a link to a specific version of a wiki page. Normal links always lead to the current version of a page, but the permalink leads to the text as it was at the time; the text does not include any edits made since. Unlike what the name suggests, the permalink does ''not'' show exactly the same page, though; only the main ''text'' is guaranteed to be retained. The pictures included in the page are still shown at their most current versions,The most obvious differences are if images that existed at the time are subsequently deleted. They would be shown as [[Wikipedia:Red link|red links]], and inevitably the layout of the article would suffer. as are the [[Help:template|templates]], most notably the [[Help:Infobox|boxes]] with text and images placed in the page's right-top corner, as well as any content [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] from other pages. In other words, the permalink displays what the article would look like today if someone [[Help:Reverting|reverted]] to the revision in question. A permalink can be made by clicking '{{int:Permalink}}' in the sidebar's toolbox or by accessing a prior version of a page from its [[Help:Page history|page history]] tab. Both of these will display that version and the page's [[:en:URL|URL]] can be used as the target of the permalink. ==Wikilinks== [[Special:PermanentLink/oldid]] or the shortcut [[Special:Permalink/oldid]] can be used to make a [[WP:WIKILINK|wikilink]] when this is preferred over a URL. oldid is the revision number in the [[WP:URLs|URL of a permanent link]] like https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Wikipedia:Help_desk&oldid=402359171, which is thus equivalent to Special:Permalink/402359171. The normal rules for wikilinks apply, e.g. regarding [[:en:MOS:SECTIONS|section names]], [[H:IW#Prefix codes for linking to projects|interwiki prefixes]] and [[WP:PIPE|pipes]]. Wikilinks work in [[WP:ES|edit summaries]], unlike URLs. A wikilink only works in Wikipedia, and some other wikis if it has the right interwiki prefix. Here are some examples showing how to wikilink from a Wikipedia page, [[Help:Page history#Linking to a specific revision of a page|to a specific version of a page]]. Note the oldid part of the permanent link, and write your own [[:en:H:WT|Wikicode]]: {| class="wikitable" |- ! [[Help:Link|Link to]] ! [[:en:H:PHLINK|How to create]] ! Result |- | [[WP:NS|any page]] in Wikipedia (an [[WP:ARTICLESPACE|article]], [[:en:H:TP|talk]], [[WP:USERPAGE|user]], [[WP:PRJ|project]] page, etc.) | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171|a version of Wikipedia:Help_desk page]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] of any page at Wikipedia
''{{xt|Note: the section title is appended to the [[WP:Revision ID|revision ID]].}}'' | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] | [[Special:Permalink/402359171#December_14|a particular section at a version of WP:HD]] |- | any page in a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]]:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwikimedia links#Prefix codes for linking to projects|prefix codes]]'' [[wikt:]] ''and'' [[c:]]''.''}} | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] | [[wikt:Special:Permalink/27434896|wiktionary:scribble in July 2014]]
---- [[c:Special:Permalink/90453750|Commons Eiffel tower sunset old rev]] |- | a [[Help:Section#Section_linking|section]] on a [[WP:SISTER|sister project]] page:
{{xt|''Note the use of [[Help:Interwiki_linking#Prefix_codes_for_linking_to_Wikimedia_sister_projects|prefix codes]]'' [[q:]] ''and'' [[m:]]''.''}} | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] | [[q:Special:Permalink/2220436#Le_Petit_Prince_(1943)|Feb 2017 rev of ''Little Prince'' quotes]]
---- [[m:Special:Permalink/18885973#Translations|old rev of Meta VisEd §Translations]] |- | any page in [[:en:List of Wikipedias|any foreign Wikipedia]]:
''{{xt|Note the use of [[Help:Interlanguage_links#Method|interlanguage prefixes]] to [[H:IW#Note on linking to foreign-language Wikiprojects|link to foreign-language Wikiprojects]].}}'' | [[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |
[[:fr:Special:Permalink/385114|oldest copy]] of [[:fr:Agra|Agra]] at [[:fr:|French Wikipedia]]
---- [[:ja:Special:Permalink/676516|oldest rev]] of [[:ja:Sydney|Sydney]] at [[:ja:|Japanese Wikipedia]] |- | the most current version of a page ('''not''' a permanent link; this is just a [[Help:Link|plain wikilink]]) | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] | [[Wikipedia:Help desk]] |} ==See also== {{Wikipedia glossary}} * [[Help:Diff]] * [[Wikipedia:Simple diff and link guide]] * {{slink|Help:Page history|Linking to a specific revision of a page}} for more details of browsing the history of Wikipedia. * [[Wikipedia:Citing Wikipedia]] for more details on how to cite Wikipedia, for which you may need a permalink. * [[Template:Oldid2]], link to an old version of a page * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki oldid|Template:Cross-wiki oldid]], link to an old version of a page in MediaWiki, Meta-Wiki, Wikibooks, Wikimedia Foundation, Wikimedia Incubator, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary * [[:en:Template:Cross-wiki language oldid|Template:Cross-wiki language oldid]], link to an old version of a page in Wikibooks, Wikinews, Wikiquote, Wikisource, Wikiversity, or Wiktionary in any language ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{Wikipedia technical help|collapsed}} [[Category:Wikipedia interface help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia sidebar help|Permanent link]] [[Category:Wikipedia links]] [[Category:Wikipedia page history]]
